Chat.title: Footnote
Chat.tagline: Ask a question about your documents – every answer is backed by its source.
Chat.empty: No questions yet. Ask your first question below.
Chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Ingest.title: Upload document
Ingest.description: Upload a .md, .txt or .pdf file (max. 10 MB). It will be parsed, split into chunks and stored as embeddings.
Ingest.created: {count, plural, one {# chunk stored} other {# chunks stored}} – “{title}”.
Ingest.exists: “{title}” already exists ({count, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}}).

validation.too-large: The file is too large (max. 10 MB).

extractError.empty: No readable text in the file.
extractError.empty-or-scanned: No readable text – possibly a scanned PDF without a text layer.
